prompt: 我有一份数学讲义 handout.html，想在第一页加一个 A4 竖版 Novak 风格的 SVG 概念图封面。内容是“函数零点与导数”，需要树形知识图谱，不要圆形脑图，最后要能导出 PDF。请给出 SVG 生成方案、插入 HTML 的 CSS 和验证步骤。
assertions: Specifies exact A4 SVG root dimensions and viewBox.
Chooses a tree/Novak layout rather than a circular mind map.
Includes inline styling and validation steps for overlap, glyphs, centering, and PDF/HTML rendering.
Includes full-page cover CSS that overrides generic image clamping.
